violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with an active Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Shrimp was observed held at 53-55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ambient of unit was 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Shrimp was voluntarily disposed of. Unit was taken out of service to hold TCS foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025

ROP Tuna was observed thawed in reach-in cooler with packaging intact. Tuna was observed at 34 degrees Fahrenheit. Tuna was opened during time of inspection. ROP seafood must be removed from packaging prior to thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2025
Gaskets for 2 door lowboy were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in goof repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the fryer and walls in kitchen and warewashing area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The floors near the ice machine area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
